arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has already outlined Bodo/Glimt's biggest threats to Tottenham after Man Utd example
arts.sum: Bodo/Glimt will come up against English opposition for the second time in the Europa League this season when they travel to Tottenham in May. The Norwegian side have shocked quite a few in the 2024/25 edition of the competition after managing to progress to a semi-final showdown against Spurs . Speaking in his pre-match press conference ahead of the game, the Portuguese boss opened up on the threat Bodo/Glimt would pose his team.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Nottingham Forest – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur entertain Nottingham Forest tonight, whose ambitions of Champions League qualification are in danger of slipping away. Forest have dropped outside of the Premier League top five after losing their last two matches. The club’s success this campaign can partly be attributed to their overall clean bill of health. arts.ttl: “My head is at Fulham” – Marco Silva insists he’s focused on PL side amid Tottenham links
arts.sum: Marco Silva insists he’s committed to Fulham amid recent claims linking him to other clubs, including Tottenham Hotspur. On Sunday, Fulham suffered a 2-1 defeat to Chelsea in the league. After the tie, Silva had a chat with DAZN in Portugal and A Bola have relayed his comments. arts.ttl: Dele Alli sends three-word message to former Tottenham teammate
arts.sum: The Belgian international was one of the most naturally gifted dribblers the game has seen and in a post recirculated on social media by Alli, has one particularly impressive stat. His skill and talent was noticed by his teammates with many now recalling how Dembele was one of the most naturally gifted players they ever shared a pitch with, but despite his talent the international's skills seems to be all but forgotten.
